commands.name: systemctl status
commands.description: 查看 systemd 服务状态
examples: systemctl status nginx # 查看 nginx 状态
systemctl status docker --no-pager # 无分页查看服务状态
systemctl status sshd -l # 查看更详细的状态输出

commands.name: systemctl start
commands.description: 启动指定 systemd 服务
examples: sudo systemctl start nginx # 启动 nginx
sudo systemctl start docker # 启动 docker 服务
sudo systemctl start redis # 启动 redis

commands.name: systemctl stop
commands.description: 停止指定 systemd 服务
examples: sudo systemctl stop nginx # 停止 nginx
sudo systemctl stop docker # 停止 docker 服务
sudo systemctl stop redis # 停止 redis

commands.name: systemctl restart
commands.description: 重启指定 systemd 服务
examples: sudo systemctl restart nginx # 重启 nginx
sudo systemctl restart docker # 重启 docker
sudo systemctl restart sshd # 重启 ssh 服务

commands.name: systemctl enable
examples: sudo systemctl enable nginx # 设置 nginx 开机启动
sudo systemctl enable docker # 设置 docker 开机启动
sudo systemctl enable --now redis # 立即启动并设置开机自启

commands.name: journalctl
commands.description: 查看 systemd 管理的系统或服务日志
examples: journalctl -u nginx -n 100 --no-pager # 查看 nginx 最近 100 条日志
journalctl -xeu docker # 查看 docker 错误日志
journalctl -f # 实时跟踪系统日志
